rationale: The only change was swapping real employer names for generic placeholders (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs). Both evaluations award the identical score of 8/10, and the strengths/concerns are substantively the same — AI-agent infrastructure experience, TypeScript/Node.js proficiency, and gaps around vector databases, RAG, LLM metrics, and cloud/GenAI delivery. The wording differs but no concern, score, or reasoning keys off the changed company names; the variation is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing rather than a demographic penalty.
